trigger.finding: The first resolution audit failed because the sparse [0,2] interval placed all wide-opening anchors under the influence of an under-resolved AR=0 observable; the nominal dx=0.02 check also changed guarded physical cell dimensions.
trigger.diagnostic_evidence: At fixed geometry the area-mean AR=0 rate was 1.35923e-10, 1.20644e-10, and 1.14238e-10 m/s for dx=0.01, 0.005, and 0.0025 um. Area versus equal-face weighting changed the rate by at most 1.5% and was not the dominant defect.

selection_robustness.rule: The original 0.08 selection must remain best on the corrected operator; otherwise invalidate the parent selection and stop without selecting a replacement.

decision_rule.grid_contraction_required: fine-vs-medium held-out prediction RMS delta < medium-vs-coarse held-out prediction RMS delta
decision_rule.note: 0.5 um is the digitization bound, not a substitute for the paper's unreported measurement uncertainty; the experimental validation gate remains non-evaluable regardless of numerical closure.
